name: PRT Intake System Upgrade
description: Modernization of Pension Risk Transfer intake system handling £10bn+ annual volume. Includes scheme data ingestion, automated benefit calculations, and pricing workflow optimization.

features.name: Scheme Data Ingestion
features.description: Automated ingestion of pension scheme data in multiple formats with validation and cleansing.
acceptanceCriteria: Given scheme data ingestion is configured, When triggered, Then expected outcome is achieved within SLA
Given valid inputs are provided, When processing completes, Then results are validated and persisted
Given edge cases occur, When handled, Then graceful error handling is applied with audit trail

stories.name: Multi-Format Parser
stories.description: As a Data Analyst, I need format-agnostic ingestion so that I can process any scheme data.
acceptanceCriteria: Given pension scheme provides member data in Excel, When file uploaded, Then 50,000+ records parsed within 5 minutes with validation report
Given scheme uses legacy column headers, When intelligent mapping runs, Then field suggestions achieve 90%+ accuracy with manual override
Given file contains duplicate NI numbers, When duplicates detected, Then records flagged with merge/split decision workflow

tasks.name: Build Excel parser with xlsxwriter supporting 1M+ rows
Implement intelligent column header matching using NLP
Create duplicate detection engine with fuzzy matching

stories.name: Data Validation Rules
stories.description: As Data Quality, I need validation rules so that I catch errors at ingestion.
acceptanceCriteria: Given member data batch ingested, When 200+ validation rules execute, Then errors categorized with correction guidance per field
Given NI number format validation fails, When error displayed, Then correct format example and common mistakes shown
Given benefit calculation validation detects discrepancy, When flagged, Then expected vs actual values displayed with calculation breakdown

tasks.name: Implement NI number validation with HMRC format checks
Build benefit calculation validation (GMP, revaluation, pension increases)

stories.name: Data Cleansing Workflows
stories.description: As an Operator, I need cleansing tools so that I can fix data issues efficiently.
acceptanceCriteria: Given multiple validation errors exist, When cleansing UI accessed, Then batch editing allows simultaneous correction of common patterns
Given address is incomplete, When Royal Mail PAF lookup triggered, Then address auto-completes from postcode with UPRN validation
Given cleansing session complete, When sign-off requested, Then audit trail captures all changes with user attribution and timestamp

tasks.name: Build batch editing UI with undo/redo functionality
Integrate Royal Mail PAF for address validation

features.name: Automated Benefit Calculations
features.description: Rules-based benefit calculation engine handling 50+ scheme rule variations with audit trails.
acceptanceCriteria: Given automated benefit calculations is configured, When triggered, Then expected outcome is achieved within SLA
Given valid inputs are provided, When processing completes, Then results are validated and persisted
Given edge cases occur, When handled, Then graceful error handling is applied with audit trail

stories.name: Benefit Calculation Engine
stories.description: As a Calculator, I need automated calculations so that I reduce manual effort.
acceptanceCriteria: Given member benefit calculation required, When engine invoked, Then pension computed per scheme rules with GMP, revaluation, and increases applied correctly
Given calculation differs from administrator figure, When variance detected, Then reconciliation workflow triggered with itemized difference analysis
Given bulk calculation batch processed, When complete, Then calculation audit trail available per TPR record-keeping requirements

tasks.name: Implement GMP revaluation calculations (fixed rate and S148 orders)

stories.name: Calculation Audit Trail
stories.description: As Compliance, I need full audit trails so that I can demonstrate calculation accuracy.
acceptanceCriteria: Given benefit calculation performed, When logged, Then complete input parameters, assumptions, and output captured per TPR governance requirements
Given audit query for specific member, When searched, Then full calculation history retrievable with version comparison
Given regulatory review requested, When exported, Then calculation evidence package generated in standardized format

tasks.name: Build ONS index integration for RPI/CPI/CPIH
Implement LPI cap and collar calculation logic

features.name: Pricing Workflow Optimization
features.description: Streamlined pricing workflow with automated handoffs, SLA tracking, and deal pipeline visibility.
acceptanceCriteria: Given pricing workflow optimization is configured, When triggered, Then expected outcome is achieved within SLA
Given valid inputs are provided, When processing completes, Then results are validated and persisted
Given edge cases occur, When handled, Then graceful error handling is applied with audit trail

stories.name: Workflow Automation
stories.description: As a Pricer, I need automated workflows so that deals progress without manual intervention.
acceptanceCriteria: Given PRT intake process initiated, When workflow triggered, Then automated task assignment routes work to appropriate specialists per SLA
Given task overdue, When escalation threshold reached, Then manager notification sent with case priority adjustment
Given workflow complete, When signed off, Then case status updated with completion timestamp and quality metrics captured

tasks.name: Implement CMI mortality model with improvements

stories.name: Pipeline Dashboard
stories.description: As Deal Lead, I need pipeline visibility so that I can manage deal flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Given PRT pipeline reviewed by management, When dashboard accessed, Then deal flow by stage displayed with expected revenue and completion dates
Given deal slips from expected close date, When detected, Then exception report highlights delay reason and mitigation
Given capacity planning required, When analyzed, Then resource allocation vs pipeline demand forecasted

tasks.name: Optimize pricing engine for sub-minute performance
Build real-time market data integration for pricing
